overall_verdict_rationale: All 13 FR criteria pass. The pre-merge adversarial squad (2026-06-23) confirmed the mission sound: CommitTargetKind eradication complete (AST-guarded, zero src/ refs), topology=None read-path absorption live and RED-first proven, C1/C6 dedup real (not abstraction-over-dupes), residue authority single-sourced, and the KEEP-set C-001..C-007 transients preserved. Two squad-caught BLOCKERs were remediated before this verdict (commit 691a5391e): FR-008's dead accept-gate and a DOA FR-013 test that aborted suite collection. Honesty caveats accepted: FR-006 C2 inline-read sweep is partial (~62 reads remain; burn-down #2100 — the load_meta authority itself is complete and correct); the #2085 acceptance-matrix-gate half is intentionally out of scope (C-010). Operator delegated this C-010 verdict to the agent reviewers (2026-06-23).
